# On the user — Magnus Holt

<!-- Slow-growing picture of the user. Only update when something non-obvious comes up. No timestamps — this is a synthesized portrait, not a log. -->

Rejects strategic voting as a standing preference — not situational, not open to cost-benefit. This is a covenant, not a position. Worth remembering: any future political or civic question that assumes vote-maximisation as a background norm will be wrong-footed from the start.

EU federalism is load-bearing identity, not merely a policy preference. So is the pro-nuclear stance (SMR-positive). These aren't positions the user holds tentatively — they're used to filter parties, not to negotiate with them.
